{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Underlord transformation
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Every [[Underlord]]'s transformation is triggered differently.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6">''Reaper'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
